mapper.select:
select data.*, (case when sw_count > 1 then CONCAT(data.sw_nm, ' 외 ', data.sw_count - 1, '종') else data.sw_nm end) sw_nm_full
from (
select
(select company_nm from v_organization_structure where origin_cd = a.comp_cd) support_company_nm, (select sw_nm from ts_work_sw where sw_cd = a.sw_cd) sw_nm, ( select count(*) from ts_work_sw_partner where comp_cd = a.comp_cd and sub_cd in (select DISTINCT sub_cd from ts_work_sw_contract where CONTRACT_NO like CONCAT('%', #{customerCode}, '%') and DELETE_YN = 'N' and CONTRACT_YEAR = #{contractYear}) ) sw_count,
sum(case when b.service_no is not null then 1 else 0 end) sum_total, -- "서비스항목_전체", sum(case when b.service_cd = 'SERVICE_ITEM_PATCH' then 1 else 0 end) sum_01, -- "PATCH", sum(case when b.service_cd = 'SERVICE_ITEM_UPGRADE' then 1 else 0 end) sum_02, -- "UPGRADE", sum(case when b.service_cd = 'SERVICE_ITEM_EDU' then 1 else 0 end) sum_03, -- "교육지원", sum(case when b.service_cd = 'SERVICE_ITEM_CUSTOM' then 1 else 0 end) sum_04, -- "맞춤지원", sum(case when b.service_cd = 'SERVICE_ITEM_TECH' then 1 else 0 end) sum_05, -- "신기술제공", sum(case when b.service_cd = 'SERVICE_ITEM_DAILY' then 1 else 0 end) sum_06, -- "일상지원", sum(case when b.service_cd = 'SERVICE_ITEM_ERROR' then 1 else 0 end) sum_07, -- "장애지원", sum(case when b.service_cd = 'SERVICE_ITEM_PERIODIC' then 1 else 0 end) sum_08, -- "정기점검",
sum(case when b.service_no is not null then 1 else 0 end) method_all, -- "지원매체_전체", sum(case when b.proc_support_cd = 'PROCESS_SUPPORT_EMAIL' then 1 else 0 end) method_01, -- "E-mail", sum(case when b.proc_support_cd = 'PROCESS_SUPPORT_ETC' then 1 else 0 end) method_02, -- "기타", sum(case when b.proc_support_cd = 'PROCESS_SUPPORT_PHONE' then 1 else 0 end) method_03, -- "전화", sum(case when b.proc_support_cd = 'PROCESS_SUPPORT_POST' then 1 else 0 end) method_04, -- "우편", sum(case when b.proc_support_cd = 'PROCESS_SUPPORT_REMOTE' then 1 else 0 end) method_05, -- "원격", sum(case when b.proc_support_cd = 'PROCESS_SUPPORT_VISIT' then 1 else 0 end) method_06 -- "방문"
from ts_work_sw_partner a
left join ts_work_history b on ( a.sub_cd = b.sub_cd and b.req_dt between #{startDate} and #{endDate} and b.CONTRACT_NO like CONCAT('%', #{customerCode}, '%') -- CONTRACT_NO 계약번호 )
where 1=1
and a.sub_cd in (select DISTINCT sub_cd from ts_work_sw_contract where CONTRACT_NO like CONCAT('%', #{customerCode}, '%') and DELETE_YN = 'N' and CONTRACT_YEAR = #{contractYear})
group by a.comp_cd ) data
order by data.support_company_nm asc

select a.sub_cd, a.partner_contract_cd, (SELECT code_text FROM tc_common_code WHERE code_cd = a.partner_contract_cd) partner_contract_cd_text, a.regular_service_cd, (SELECT code_text FROM tc_common_code WHERE code_cd = a.regular_service_cd) regular_service_cd_text, a.subscription_yn, (select company_nm from v_organization_structure where origin_cd = a.comp_cd) support_company_nm, (select sw_nm from ts_work_sw where sw_cd = a.sw_cd) sw_nm,
sum(case when b.service_no is not null then 1 else 0 end) sum_total, -- "서비스항목_전체", sum(case when b.service_cd = 'SERVICE_ITEM_PATCH' then 1 else 0 end) sum_01, -- "PATCH", sum(case when b.service_cd = 'SERVICE_ITEM_UPGRADE' then 1 else 0 end) sum_02, -- "UPGRADE", sum(case when b.service_cd = 'SERVICE_ITEM_EDU' then 1 else 0 end) sum_03, -- "교육지원", sum(case when b.service_cd = 'SERVICE_ITEM_CUSTOM' then 1 else 0 end) sum_04, -- "맞춤지원", sum(case when b.service_cd = 'SERVICE_ITEM_TECH' then 1 else 0 end) sum_05, -- "신기술제공", sum(case when b.service_cd = 'SERVICE_ITEM_DAILY' then 1 else 0 end) sum_06, -- "일상지원", sum(case when b.service_cd = 'SERVICE_ITEM_ERROR' then 1 else 0 end) sum_07, -- "장애지원", sum(case when b.service_cd = 'SERVICE_ITEM_PERIODIC' then 1 else 0 end) sum_08, -- "정기점검",
sum(case when b.service_no is not null then 1 else 0 end) method_all, -- "지원매체_전체", sum(case when b.proc_support_cd = 'PROCESS_SUPPORT_EMAIL' then 1 else 0 end) method_01, -- "E-mail", sum(case when b.proc_support_cd = 'PROCESS_SUPPORT_ETC' then 1 else 0 end) method_02, -- "기타", sum(case when b.proc_support_cd = 'PROCESS_SUPPORT_PHONE' then 1 else 0 end) method_03, -- "전화", sum(case when b.proc_support_cd = 'PROCESS_SUPPORT_POST' then 1 else 0 end) method_04, -- "우편", sum(case when b.proc_support_cd = 'PROCESS_SUPPORT_REMOTE' then 1 else 0 end) method_05, -- "원격", sum(case when b.proc_support_cd = 'PROCESS_SUPPORT_VISIT' then 1 else 0 end) method_06, -- "방문"
a.remark
from ts_work_sw_partner a
left join ts_work_history b on ( a.sub_cd = b.sub_cd and b.req_dt between #{startDate} and #{endDate} and b.CONTRACT_NO like CONCAT('%', #{customerCode}, '%') )
where 1=1 and a.sub_cd in (select DISTINCT sub_cd from ts_work_sw_contract where CONTRACT_NO like CONCAT('%', #{customerCode}, '%') and DELETE_YN = 'N' and CONTRACT_YEAR = #{contractYear})
and a.partner_contract_cd = #{partnerContractCd}
group by a.sub_cd, a.comp_cd
order by a.sub_cd asc

select a.sub_cd, a.partner_contract_cd, (SELECT code_text FROM tc_common_code WHERE code_cd = a.partner_contract_cd) partner_contract_cd_text, a.regular_service_cd, (SELECT code_text FROM tc_common_code WHERE code_cd = a.regular_service_cd) regular_service_cd_text, a.subscription_yn, (select company_nm from v_organization_structure where origin_cd = a.comp_cd) support_company_nm, (select sw_nm from ts_work_sw where sw_cd = a.sw_cd) sw_nm,
sum(case when b.service_no is not null then 1 else 0 end) sum_total, -- "서비스항목_전체", sum(case when b.service_cd = 'SERVICE_ITEM_PATCH' then 1 else 0 end) sum_01, -- "PATCH", sum(case when b.service_cd = 'SERVICE_ITEM_UPGRADE' then 1 else 0 end) sum_02, -- "UPGRADE", sum(case when b.service_cd = 'SERVICE_ITEM_EDU' then 1 else 0 end) sum_03, -- "교육지원", sum(case when b.service_cd = 'SERVICE_ITEM_CUSTOM' then 1 else 0 end) sum_04, -- "맞춤지원", sum(case when b.service_cd = 'SERVICE_ITEM_TECH' then 1 else 0 end) sum_05, -- "신기술제공", sum(case when b.service_cd = 'SERVICE_ITEM_DAILY' then 1 else 0 end) sum_06, -- "일상지원", sum(case when b.service_cd = 'SERVICE_ITEM_ERROR' then 1 else 0 end) sum_07, -- "장애지원", sum(case when b.service_cd = 'SERVICE_ITEM_PERIODIC' then 1 else 0 end) sum_08, -- "정기점검",
sum(case when b.service_no is not null then 1 else 0 end) method_all, -- "지원매체_전체", sum(case when b.proc_support_cd = 'PROCESS_SUPPORT_EMAIL' then 1 else 0 end) method_01, -- "E-mail", sum(case when b.proc_support_cd = 'PROCESS_SUPPORT_ETC' then 1 else 0 end) method_02, -- "기타", sum(case when b.proc_support_cd = 'PROCESS_SUPPORT_PHONE' then 1 else 0 end) method_03, -- "전화", sum(case when b.proc_support_cd = 'PROCESS_SUPPORT_POST' then 1 else 0 end) method_04, -- "우편", sum(case when b.proc_support_cd = 'PROCESS_SUPPORT_REMOTE' then 1 else 0 end) method_05, -- "원격", sum(case when b.proc_support_cd = 'PROCESS_SUPPORT_VISIT' then 1 else 0 end) method_06, -- "방문"
a.remark
from ts_work_sw_partner a
left join ts_work_history b on ( a.sub_cd = b.sub_cd and b.req_dt between #{startDate} and #{endDate} and b.CONTRACT_NO like CONCAT('%', #{customerCode}, '%') )
where 1=1 and a.sub_cd = #{subCd} group by a.sub_cd, a.comp_cd
order by a.sub_cd asc
